entry.title: New: BFED-12 Bill 177 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
BILLS 177 (2025) AND 178 (2025), AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET: CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS, DEPARTMENT OF ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT (LAHAINA WASTEWATER RECLAMATION FACILITY RETURNED ACTIVATED SLUDGE/DEWATERING UPGRADES) (BFED-12)

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
